title: MailerLite vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
intro: Both MailerLite and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are popular email marketing platforms with freemium models, but they cater to different business needs. MailerLite excels in simplicity and e-commerce marketing, while Sendinblue offers broader omnichannel capabilities including SMS and CRM. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your marketing strategy.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, pop-ups, surveys
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, WhatsApp, transactional API, chat, CRM suite

comparison_table.tool_a: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget

choose_a_if: You want the simplest, most intuitive interface for email marketing
You're building landing pages and pop-ups for e-commerce
You need an affordable solution for growing small businesses
You prefer budget-friendly paid plans starting at just $9/month
choose_b_if: You need SMS and WhatsApp messaging alongside email
You require a transactional API for automated notifications
You want an integrated CRM suite with built-in chat support
You have large contact lists and need the generous free tier (100k subscribers)

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite wins for ease of use and e-commerce marketing with a more intuitive editor and affordable pricing. Sendinblue (Brevo) is better if you need omnichannel capabilities like SMS, WhatsApp, and a built-in CRM. For most small businesses focused purely on email, MailerLite is the simpler choice.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Sendinblue?
faq.a: MailerLite is cheaper for email marketing alone, with plans starting at $9/month compared to Sendinblue's $25/month. However, Sendinblue's free tier allows 100,000 subscribers versus MailerLite's 1,000, making it better value if you have a large contact list. The best choice depends on your subscriber count and feature requirements.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, switching is straightforward. Both platforms support CSV exports and API integrations, allowing you to migrate your contact lists, automation workflows, and email templates. Plan your migration timeline carefully, test your campaigns in MailerLite first, and ensure all integrations are reconfigured before fully transitioning.
